title: Buildah v1.28.2 to 1.29.1 introduced breaking change for unsupported filesystems
body:
On 1.28.2 and earlier, unsupported filesystems, such as `0x53464846` for WSLFS would not abort the command and would complete the action.

I suspect this pull request may be related to the breaking behavior:
Update c/storage after https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1436

```
sudo buildah build --log-level=debug
DEBU[0000] Pull Policy for pull [ifnewer]
DEBU[0000] Setting MaxPullPushRetries to 3 and PullPushRetryDelay to 2s
DEBU[0000] [graphdriver] trying provided driver "overlay"
DEBU[0000] Unknown filesystem type 0x53464846 reported for /var/lib/containers/storage
Error: filesystem type 0x53464846 reported for /var/lib/containers/storage is not supported with 'overlay': backing file system is unsupported for this graph driver
DEBU[0000] [graphdriver] trying provided driver "overlay"
DEBU[0000] Unknown filesystem type 0x53464846 reported for /var/lib/containers/storage
WARN[0000] failed to shutdown storage: "filesystem type 0x53464846 reported for /var/lib/containers/storage is not supported with 'overlay': backing file system is unsupported for this graph driver"
```

Reference related issue: https://github.com/containers/storage/issues/1546
